summary: Testing completed for Employee Cash Advance feature and Farm Expense receipt upload. All 10 features tested and verified working. Backend returns correct {expense, message} format, employee names shown in expense tables, Farm Expense includes receipt upload with skip option.

employee_cash_advance_button.details: Employee Cash Advance button visible on Expenses page with violet styling, alongside Farm Expense and Customer Cash Out buttons

employee_cash_advance_dialog.details: Dialog opens with all required fields: employee selector, amount, date, description, notes. Violet info box explains functionality.

employee_advance_api_response.details: POST /api/expenses/employee-advance returns {expense, message} format with employee name in message

employee_name_in_expenses_page.details: Employee name shown as 'Employee: [name]' in violet text for Employee Advance category expenses

employee_advance_badge_styling.details: Employee Advance badge shows violet styling (bg-violet-50 text-violet-700 border-violet-200)

farm_expense_receipt_upload.details: Farm Expense dialog includes ReceiptUploadInline component with 'Click to upload' and 'Use Phone' options

farm_expense_skip_message.details: Skip message visible: 'No receipt yet? Skip this — you can upload it later from the Closing Wizard or the expense row's upload button.'

farm_expense_creation.details: Farm expense creation works correctly with optional receipt upload, returns {expense, invoice, message}

accounting_page_employee_name.details: Accounting page expense table also shows employee name for Employee Advance expenses

seed_data_creation: Created test Employee Advance expenses via API during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: (1) Employee Cash Advance button on Expenses page with dialog, (2) Employee name shown in expense summaries on both Expenses and Accounting pages, (3) Farm Expense dialog includes receipt upload with skip option. Backend API returns {expense, message} format for employee-advance endpoint.
